case_title: NEWMAN, FANNIE VS STEARNS, STEVEN D.

docket_entries.description: SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT STEARNS, STEVEN D.
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,000.00 FILED BY NEWMAN, FANNIE AS TO DEFENDANT STEARNS, STEVEN D. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-04-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 03
